The group reaches a swift river, seeing a beautiful meadow on the far side. Exhausted, they camp by the bank while the Tin Woodman begins building a raft. Dorothy falls asleep, dreaming of the Emerald City.
Group arrives at the bank, visibly exhausted by travel.
Dorothy asleep in a dreamlike state under night sky.
